name: Mermaid Timeline — History of Vaccine Development
input: Create a timeline showing vaccine development milestones from 1796 to 2020.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Chronological timeline with dated milestones and brief descriptions.

data.syntax:
timeline
    title History of Vaccine Development
    1796 : Smallpox vaccine
         : Edward Jenner
    1885 : Rabies vaccine
         : Louis Pasteur
    1921 : BCG tuberculosis vaccine
    1955 : Polio vaccine
         : Jonas Salk
    1971 : MMR combined vaccine
    2020 : COVID-19 mRNA vaccines
         : Pfizer and Moderna
data.caption: Key milestones in the history of vaccine development from 1796 to 2020
